name: threadz
description: Threadz - Complete T-shirt Design and E-commerce Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" || echo 'Run backend and frontend separately:' && echo 'npm run dev:backend' && echo 'npm run dev:frontend'
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.build:backend: cd Threadz-V1/backend && echo 'Backend is ready for deployment'
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" || echo 'Run backend and frontend separately:' && echo 'npm run start:backend' && echo 'npm run start:frontend'
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:backend: cd Threadz-V1/backend && python -m flake8 app/ || true
scripts.setup: npm run setup:env && npm run setup:deps
scripts.setup:deps: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.docker:dev: docker-compose up --build || echo 'Docker not found. Install Docker first: https://docs.docker.com/get-docker/'
scripts.docker:prod: docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up --build || echo 'Docker not found. Install Docker first: https://docs.docker.com/get-docker/'
scripts.seed: cd Threadz-V1/backend && python -m app.seed_data || echo 'Seed script not found'
scripts.clean: npm run clean:frontend && npm run clean:backend

author: Threadz Team
